history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed in upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 due to HttpStatus.is4xxClientError signature change in Spring Framework 6, which expects no arguments instead of a HttpStatusCode.
history.qwen_rationale: Spring Boot 3.x uses Spring Framework 6, where HttpStatus.is4xxClientError() was changed to take no arguments. The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe may not cover all Spring Framework 6 API shifts. Adding UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 explicitly targets these framework-level API migrations and should fix the method reference error before compilation.
